title: hibbertia pungens
intro: Hibbertia pungens, also known as guinea flower, is a small, evergreen shrub native to Australia, characterized by its bright yellow and red flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore muscles and joints. The health benefits of Hibbertia pungens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving circulation. Hibbertia pungens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
